title: Valid Permutations for DI Sequence
hints: Consider building the permutation by inserting numbers 0 to n one by one. How does the relative order of elements change?
Use dynamic programming where the state tracks the number of elements placed and the rank of the last element among the remaining available slots.
When inserting the next number, update the DP table by summing over valid previous ranks, using prefix sums to handle 'I' and 'D' transitions efficiently.
